data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT: {"version":1,"epicId":"8df3-61d0","generatedAt":"2026-04-06T20:53:05Z","generatedBy":"preplanning","epic":{"title":"Behavioral testing standard and agent prompt reform","description":"Test-writing agents produce tests that check implementation details rather than observable behavior. This epic creates a shared behavioral testing standard, adds testing_mode classification to implementation-plan, and updates all test-writing agent prompts.","successCriteria":["All test-writing agent prompts consume a shared behavioral testing standard with 4 sequential rules","Implementation-plan classifies each task testing mode: RED, GREEN, or UPDATE","Sprint orchestrator consumes testing_mode field and routes accordingly","RED test writer includes explicit no new tests needed exit path","Fix-bug integrates RED/GREEN/UPDATE testing model","RED test evaluator aligned with shared standard"]},"stories":[{"id":"4095-e3d9","title":"As a test-writing agent, I consume a shared behavioral testing standard so my tests resist refactoring","description":"Create shared prompt fragment at plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/behavioral-testing-standard.md with 4 sequential rules","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When this story is complete, a prompt fragment exists at plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/behavioral-testing-standard.md containing 4 sequential rules","Unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic"],"considerations":["[Maintainability] Shared prompt consumed by 5+ agents \u2014 single-source-of-truth pattern"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":[],"satisfiesCriterion":"All test-writing agent prompts consume a shared behavioral testing standard with 4 sequential rules"},{"id":"8ce4-035b","title":"As a test-writing agent, I know whether a task requires RED, GREEN, or UPDATE testing","description":"Update implementation-plan to emit testing_mode per task","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When this story is complete, implementation-plan emits a testing_mode field (RED, GREEN, or UPDATE) for each task","When this story is complete, implementation-plan frames testing tasks in terms of behavior","Unit tests written and passing"],"considerations":["[Testing] testing_mode is new LLM classification \u2014 eval coverage needed","[Integration] testing_mode must survive task creation pipeline"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["4095-e3d9"],"satisfiesCriterion":"Implementation-plan classifies each task testing mode: RED, GREEN, or UPDATE"},{"id":"80c9-df3c","title":"As the RED test writer, I can exit with no new tests needed","description":"Add explicit exit path for GREEN-classified tasks and sufficient existing coverage","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When this story is complete, RED test writer has no new tests needed exit path","RED_TEST_WRITER_OUTPUT contract updated with new output format","RED_TEST_EVALUATOR_VERDICT contract updated","Sprint orchestrator parser handles new output value","Unit tests written and passing"],"considerations":["[Testing] Exit path must not create loophole","[Contract] Third output format requires atomic contract+parser
